name: AI-Driven Multi-Hop Relay Selection for Smart Urban NR-V2X Networks via Learning-to-Optimize Graph Neural Networks
summary: arXiv:2607.20554v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reliable and low-latency NR-V2X communications are essential for smart mobility in dense urban environments. However, limited Road-Side Unit (RSU) de...
description: arXiv:2607.20554v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reliable and low-latency NR-V2X communications are essential for smart mobility in dense urban environments. However, limited Road-Side Unit (RSU) density, frequent non-line-of-sight conditions, and highly dynamic vehicular topologies often prevent many Connected and Automated Vehicles (CAVs) from maintaining stable single-hop connectivity. Althou...
author: Giambattista Amati, Federica Mangiatordi, Simone Angelini, Emiliano Pallotti, Pierpaolo Salvo
